TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Halusipun = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Sinyisyang ka alang Halusipun. 46 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 128 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 40% niqan 51 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 60% niqan 77 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 38%, Amis 1%, Cou 2%.
S.PHON: = ħalusipun = gaga mniq nantowsən sinjisjaŋ ka alaŋ ħalusipun. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, amis *%, ʦou *%.
S.FORM: = Halusipun = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Sinyisyang ka alang Halusipun. 46 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 128 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 40% niqan 51 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 60% niqan 77 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 38%, Amis 1%, Cou 2%.
S.PHON: = ħalusipun = gaga mniq nantowsən sinjisjaŋ ka alaŋ ħalusipun. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, amis *%, ʦou *%.
